section_name: Contents of Notice of Suspension or Denial of License
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.034 — Contents of Notice of Suspension or Denial of License

A notice of suspension or denial of a license must state:

    (1) the reason and statutory grounds for the action;

    (2) the effective date of the suspension or denial;

    (3) the right of the person to a hearing;

    (4) how to request a hearing; and

    (5) the period in which a request for a hearing must be received by the department.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A notice of suspension or denial of a license must state:
the reason and statutory grounds for the action;
the effective date of the suspension or denial;
the right of the person to a hearing;
how to request a hearing; and
the period in which a request for a hearing must be received by the department.
